title: Sending updates content & update poster using automation
excerpt: Hello, is there a way to create a custom automation to send the content of an update & the user who posted the update in a slack message or email.

posts.author: AhmedFahmy_NewAge (Ahmed Fahmy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, is there a way to create a custom automation to send the content of an update & the user who posted the update in a slack message or email.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@AhmedFahmy_NewAge ,
Yes, you can create a custom automation to send the content of an update and the user who posted the update in a Slack message or email using Make.
